title: Red Hat Security Advisory: binutils security update
overview:
An update for binutils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: binutils security update

An update for binutils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for binutils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
binutils-2.41-58.el10.src.rpm
binutils-2.41-58.el10.x86_64.rpm
binutils-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.x86_64.rpm
binutils-debugsource-2.41-58.el10.x86_64.rpm
binutils-devel-2.41-58.el10.x86_64.rpm
binutils-gold-2.41-58.el10.x86_64.rpm
binutils-gold-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.x86_64.rpm
binutils-gprofng-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.x86_64.rpm
cross-binutils-aarch64-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.x86_64.rpm
cross-binutils-ppc64le-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.x86_64.rpm
cross-binutils-s390x-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.x86_64.rpm
binutils-2.41-58.el10.s390x.rpm
binutils-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.s390x.rpm
binutils-debugsource-2.41-58.el10.s390x.rpm
binutils-devel-2.41-58.el10.s390x.rpm
binutils-gold-2.41-58.el10.s390x.rpm
binutils-gold-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.s390x.rpm
binutils-2.41-58.el10.ppc64le.rpm
binutils-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.ppc64le.rpm
binutils-debugsource-2.41-58.el10.ppc64le.rpm
binutils-devel-2.41-58.el10.ppc64le.rpm
binutils-gold-2.41-58.el10.ppc64le.rpm
binutils-gold-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.ppc64le.rpm
binutils-2.41-58.el10.aarch64.rpm
binutils-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.aarch64.rpm
binutils-debugsource-2.41-58.el10.aarch64.rpm
binutils-devel-2.41-58.el10.aarch64.rpm
binutils-gold-2.41-58.el10.aarch64.rpm
binutils-gold-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.aarch64.rpm
binutils-gprofng-debuginfo-2.41-58.el10.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-5244: A vulnerability was found in GNU Binutils 2.40 to version 2.44 and affects the elf_gc_sweep function of the bfd/elflink.c file of the component ld. The manipulation leads to memory corruption and a program crash. An attacker must have local access to exploit this vulnerability.
